host.name: Dee And Ryan
highlights: Fun fact: We travel with four adventurous dogs
host.about:
Welcome to Solnest Stays! We’re Dee and Ryan, founders passionate about creating elevated, comfortable spaces for travelers. What began as a side project grew into a love for short-term rentals — blending hospitality with design to ensure every stay feels special.

Outside of hosting, Dee is a nurse and Ryan a pilot, so we know the value of having a place to truly unwind. We spend winters skiing, and travel whenever our dog pack lets us!

htmlDescription.htmlText:
Welcome to Après Arcade, a 3BR, 2BA ski in and ski out to Burfield lodge (2 min walk from condo). Sleeps 7 with 2 queen beds and a single-over-double bunk. Enjoy a private hot tub, cozy fireplace, and deck views. The garage doubles as a fun après space with Arcade games, a beer fridge, TV, and EV charger. Family-friendly with board games, a pack ’n play, high chair, and kids’ dinnerware. Steps to a market, pharmacy, and late-night restaurant— your perfect mountain getaway year-round!

The space
✨ Key Features

☀Pet-Friendly
☀ Sleeps 7 comfortably: 2 Queen beds + 1 Single-over-double bunk
☀ 2 Bathrooms: Master bath with a walk-in shower + powder room with a tub
☀ Ski in & Ski out to Burfield Lodge (2 min walk from condo)
☀ Private hot tub on the deck with mountain views
☀ Fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances and dining for 8
☀ Cozy living room with fireplace, Smart TV, and board games
☀ Family-friendly: Includes pack ’n play, high chair, and kids’ dinnerware
☀ 2 parking spots in front of the unit
☀ Heated garage with EV charger, beer fridge, TV, and ski & bike gear drying area—the ultimate après-ski setup.
☀ Steps to market, pharmacy, and a restaurant open until 2 AM


🛏 Bedrooms

Primary Suite (Main Floor)
Queen bed with plush bedding, walk-in closet, and ensuite bathroom featuring a shower and scenic view.

Second Bedroom
Queen bed with mountain views and cozy finishes for restful nights.

Bunk Room
Single-over-double bunk bed with a view—perfect for kids or additional guests.

🛁 Bathrooms

Ensuite: Walk-in shower with large vanity

Main Bath: Toilet and tub-shower combo for shared use

🍽 Kitchen & Dining

Kitchen
Fully equipped kitchen with full-sized appliances, cookware, and essentials for family meals.

Dining Area
Seating for eight with open flow into the living room—ideal for group dining or game nights.

🛋 Living Spaces

Warm and inviting living room with fireplace and Smart TV

Access to the deck and hot tub from the living area

Board games for cozy evenings in

Washer and dryer for guest convenience

🌲 Outdoor Space

Private deck with hot tub and mountain views

Ski-in/out to Burfield lodge (2 min walk from condo)

Garage with Arcade games, EV charger, beer fridge, and mounted TV for après-ski hangouts

2 parking spots in front of the unit

📍 Location Highlights

Sun Peaks slopes – 2 min walk / ski-in access

Market, pharmacy & restaurant – steps away

Sun Peaks Village – 3 min drive

Kamloops – 45 min drive

Kamloops Airport (YKA) – 55 min drive

Registration number: H498116653

Registration Details
Municipal registration number: 1158
Provincial registration number: H498116653
